title: ViresGD/VibeSwarm

title: Hossain-Albasha/arabic-og-llm-eval
summary: Bilingual Arabic / English Oil & Gas LLM evaluation benchmark and harness. 50 hand-curated items across terminology, safety, process Q&A, code-switched, and document grounding categories.

title: 7blacky7/synapse
summary: KI-Gedächtnis & Code-Intelligenz — Semantische Code-Suche, Wissensaustausch und Projekt-Pläne über MCP (Model Context Protocol). Verbindet lokale CLIs (Claude Code, Codex) und Web-KIs (Claude.ai) mit Qdrant + Ollama Embeddings.

title: Nicholas-Kloster/visorgoose
summary: Multi-source AI infrastructure discovery for government TLDs — CT logs + Shodan + DNS + Ollama fingerprinting with Mullvad VPN guard

title: Th3rdai/CodeCompanion
summary: Th3rdAI Code Companion — helps vibe coders understand, review, and improve AI-generated code using local Ollama LLMs

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: garudust-org/garudust-agent
summary: 🦅 Self-improving Rust AI agent — multi-agent delegation, auto-skill learning, multi-platform chat bots, persistent memory, MCP tools, cron scheduling and a production-grade gateway

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: strikersam/local-llm-server
summary: Self-hosted local LLM server & AI control plane — OpenAI-compatible proxy for Ollama, multi-agent orchestration, unified dashboard, and zero API bills.

title: PatriceA/octipus
summary: An open-source, self-hosted assistant that delegates real work to a swarm of specialist AI agents.

title: greg-gzillion/clawpack_v2
summary: 🦞 Unified AI Agent Ecosystem with Common Chronicle-inspired knowledge indexing. 15+ specialized agents for documents, diagrams, blockchain, math, translation, and more.

title: gabrielvuksani/wotann
summary: WOTANN — The All-Father of AI agent harnesses. One install. Every model. Every channel. Full autonomy.

title: mouseart2025/AI-Reader-V2
summary: AI 小说分析可视化工具 — 角色关系图谱 · 地理地图 · 时间线 · 百科全书 | 支持 Ollama 本地 + 10 大云端 LLM | React + FastAPI + SQLite

title: DaveSteadman/KoreStack
summary: Consolidation of Agent and MCP Server tools.

title: notadev-iamaura/OneRAG
summary: Production-ready RAG Framework (Python/FastAPI). 1-line config swaps: 6 Vector DBs (Weaviate, Pinecone, Qdrant, ChromaDB, pgvector, MongoDB), 5 LLMs (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, Ollama, OpenRouter). OpenAI-compatible API. 2100+ tests.

title: skymoonsun/model-maestro
summary: Unified LLM Gateway that proxies multiple providers (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) behind a single API. Enables IDEs and tools to access    multiple models via standard API formats. Manage LLM usage with per-user token limits, request logging, load balancing, model groups, and an admin dashboard.

title: AbdoKnbGit/tau
summary: Tau is an open-source AI coding agent built for developers who want control. It runs in your terminal, supports multiple model providers, and helps you write, debug, refactor, and ship code without locking you into one ecosystem.

title: GatoaoCubo/cex
summary: "Open-source AI brain. Typed knowledge system that compounds across Claude / Codex / Gemini / Ollama."

title: BigBeardedMan/Loom
summary: Native macOS workspace for terminals, editor, AI agents, and task state in one window. Local-first, single-user, no tiers.
